Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class TestSubFormulas

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.TestSubFormulas
public class TestSubFormulas extends Object

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TestSubFormulas()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    testBdFilter()
    Ensures that the position of a bound identifier declaration can be retrieved or not retrieved from all places where a declaration can occur.
    void
    testDeepPositions()
    Ensures that a sub-expression that occurs deeply in a formula can be retrieved.
    void
    testEqualsFilter()
    Ensures that the position of a predicate can be retrieved from all contexts.
    void
    testExpressionRewriting()
    Ensures that multiple expression rewriting can be performed in all places where a rewritable sub-expression can occur.
    void
    testIdFilter()
    Ensures that the position of an expression can be retrieved or not retrieved from all places where an expression can occur.
    void
    testOldFilterOnPredicateVariable()
     
    void
    testOldRewriterOnPredicateVariable()
     
    void
    testPositionAllClasses()
    Ensures that filtering is implemented for all kinds of formulas.
    void
    testPredicateRewriting()
    Ensures that a predicate can be rewritten in all contexts.
    void
    testRewritingAllClasses()
    Ensures that rewriting is implemented for all kinds of formulas.

    • testBdFilter

      public void testBdFilter() throws Exception
      Ensures that the position of a bound identifier declaration can be retrieved or not retrieved from all places where a declaration can occur.

      public void testIdFilter() throws Exception
      Ensures that the position of an expression can be retrieved or not retrieved from all places where an expression can occur.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testEqualsFilter

      public void testEqualsFilter() throws Exception
      Ensures that the position of a predicate can be retrieved from all contexts.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testOldFilterOnPredicateVariable

      public void testOldFilterOnPredicateVariable() throws Exception
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testPositionAllClasses

      public void testPositionAllClasses() throws Exception
      Ensures that filtering is implemented for all kinds of formulas. Also ensures that one can rewrite the root of any formula.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testDeepPositions

      public void testDeepPositions()
      Ensures that a sub-expression that occurs deeply in a formula can be retrieved.

    • testExpressionRewriting

      public void testExpressionRewriting()
      Ensures that multiple expression rewriting can be performed in all places where a rewritable sub-expression can occur.

    • testPredicateRewriting

      public void testPredicateRewriting() throws Exception
      Ensures that a predicate can be rewritten in all contexts.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testRewritingAllClasses

      public void testRewritingAllClasses() throws Exception
      Ensures that rewriting is implemented for all kinds of formulas.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testOldRewriterOnPredicateVariable

      public void testOldRewriterOnPredicateVariable() throws Exception
      Throws:
      Exception
